title: ZHIHUI Red Satin Ribbon 10mm, 22 Meters Solid Colors Fabric Ribbon, Perfect for Wedding Decor, Wreath, Baby Shower, Gift Package Wrapping, Party Balloon & Hair Bows Decoration and Other Projects
features: Each roll is 0.39"/10mm in width and 24 yards/22 Meters in length.
Each roll of ribbon is made of high-quality polyester, one side can be very smooth and colored, it is your best choice for DIY projects.
These beautiful ribbons can be used in various gift boxes, such as birthday gift boxes, wedding gift boxes, souvenir boxes, cake boxes and cookie boxes.
It can also be used to bandage flowers and wedding invitations. The length of each roll of ribbon can meet your needs, and it can be decorated with beautiful bows.

But also DIY into beautiful hair bands, hair accessories, bow hair Rope, balloons decoration, etc. Can be woven into your own unique bridal bracelet, bridesmaid wristband corsage, souvenir strap, brooch, graduation ribbon lei, pet decoration, etc.
description: ZHIHUI Red Satin Ribbon 10mm, 22 Meters Solid Colors Fabric Ribbon, Perfect for Wedding Decor, Wreath, Baby Shower, Gift Package Wrapping, Party Balloon & Hair Bows Decoration and Other Projects Product specifications: Color: Red Material: high-quality polyester Size: Width: 10mm /Length: 22m Package: 1rolls 22m satin ribbon Scope of application: Scene layout, gift packaging, personal DIY crafts, hairbands, bridal bracelets, bridesmaid wristbands, flowers, brooches and pet decorations, etc.
